commit.subject: LU-17066 tests: reproducer
commit.message:
LU-17066 tests: reproducer

a simple reproducer for LU-17066:
lod_xattr_set()) ASSERTION( (!!(!strcmp(name, "lustre.""lov")
	|| !strcmp(name, "trusted.lov")) ==
	!!(!lod_dt_obj(dt)->ldo_comp_cached)) ) failed

Test-Parameters: fortestonly env=ONLY=1000 testlist=sanity
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I635eee39b2e1ff343aa75e83e733dadc27142f96
